title: Vein Miner | Veinst
description: quickly mine entire veins of ores by breaking one block, which automatically breaks all connected blocks of the same type within a certain radius.
body:
NEWLY RELEASED WITH FRESH FEATURES AND NOW FULLY SUPPORTS BOTH VANILLA AND MODDED ORES.


Breaks Entire Vein

![breaking gold vein](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08bd928838f689ebbac7739ed7a8c8abc88f8373.gif)


Modded Ore Support

![breaking modded ore vein](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80f600d11056dfe811663df9cd2f9b648e2083b6.gif)


Veinst operates just like the beloved vein mining, vein miner and veinminer mods you've come to know and love, allowing you to effortlessly harvest entire ore veins with a single mining action. Say goodbye to tedious block-by-block mining and hello to streamlined resource gathering!


Whether you're a seasoned miner or a newcomer to the game, Veinst makes mining more efficient and enjoyable than ever before. Simply activate the vein mining feature by holding your sneak key, and watch as surrounding ore blocks are automatically mined, saving you time and effort.
